roa.docketEntryComment: Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance

/CAL:SENTENCE/INTC/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 29 D/CTS:29/WS/WEAP/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSESS ANY AMMUNITION/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/SAORD4:THE AREA BOUNDED BY BUSH ST, MASON ST, MARKET ST, TURK ST & VAN NESS AVE, SF CA/SAORD/CTORD:THE SENTENCE FOR COUNT 5 IS IDENTICAL & SHALL RUN CONCURRENT TO THE SENTENCE IN COUNT 3/CTORD:ALL FINES AN FEES IMPOSED ARE STAYED DUE TO INDIGENCE/VD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22/

/CAL:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION & PC17(B) MOTION/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO REDUCE COUNT 3 TO A MISDEMEANOR& TO ADD A COUNT 5, PC166(A)(4),A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF NL/DEFT ADV RTS:1 & 3/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:THE PEOPLE MOVE TO AMEND TO INCLUDE COUNT 3, 32PC, A FELONY, (AFTER THE FACT) & COUNT 4, 26350PC, A MISDEMEANOR/ARG&SUB/AMEND:ADDING COUNTS 3 & 4/FAWC/IRRC/X:DEFENDANT PLEADS NOT GUILTY ON COUNTS 3 & 4/ARG&SUB/HTA1:3/CTORD:THE MISDEMEANOR AT COUNT 4IS CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/BAIL:50,000/871D:1 & 2/DEFTCUST3/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION & PC17(B) MOTION/DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:DEFENDANT IS WILLING TO BIFURCATE HIS PRELIMINARY HEARING FOR HIS COUNSEL/X:THE PEOPLE MOVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINTTO INCLUDE COUNTS 3 & 4/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/INVOFF:SFPD SGT, MARTIN BANDVIK//WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, KEVIN SIEN/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, SANDON CHEUNG/EXHMA:PEO 1 - 1 PAGE DOCUMENT (DOUBLE SIDED)/EXHMA:PEO 2 - 1 PAGE DOCUMENT (DOUBLE SIDED)/EXHMA:PEO 3 - 1 PAGE DOCUMENT (DOUBLE SIDED)/EXHMA:PEO 4 -1 PAGE DOCUMENT (DOUBLE SIDED)/EXHMA:PEO 5 - 2 PAGE DOCUMENT/EXHMA:PEO 6- 2 PAGE DOCUMENT/EXHMA:PEO 7 - 2 PAGE DOCUMENT/EXHMA:PEO 8 - CD/CTORD:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IS DENIED/EXHMA:PEO 9 - 8,5 X 11INCH COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:PEO 10 - LARGE HAND-DRAWN DIAGRAM/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, GABRIEL ALCARAZ/EXHM:PEO 11 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTO/EXHMA:PEO12 - 8,5 X 11 INCH COLOR PHOTO/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO REDUCE BAIL OR RELEASE/MO GRTD/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ON HOME DETENTION WITH A CURFEW BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 6PM AND 7AM AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/WEAP/SA1:JORGE A/SA2:THE AREA BOUNDEDBY GROVE ST,, GEARY ST,, VAN NESS AVE,, AND HYDE ST,,SF/CONTD:PRELIMINARYHEARING/DOP/LD:01-29-20/INTC/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:PAM HERZIG/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-29-20/987,2/BAIL:100,000/CONTD:BAIL HEARING ON 01-17-20/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 01-28-20/DOP/
/CAL:RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT, NON COMPLIANCE/INTC/BAIL:50,000/X:COURT DATE OF 01-28-20 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/
